Do na hidhen fytit militantët e Trumpit në këtë temë, po ia vlen.

Donald Trump është pronar zyrash, hotelesh e ndërtesash në disa qytete të Amerikës. Dhe gjatë fushatës, kandidati Trump, me lekët e dhuruar nga simpatizantët e fushatës Trump, ka paguar qira të majme kur ka përdorur ambientet e firmave të veta.

Disa shembuj pikantë:

  • fushata Trump paguan rreth 170 mijë dollarë në muaj qira për ambientet e përdorura në Trump Tower në New York - për të njëjtën zyrë, Trump i paguante vetes 35 mijë dollarë në mars (Huffington Post)
  • Trump shpenzoi $55,000 nga fondet e fushatës për të blerë 3500 kopje të librit të tij, Crippled America, që t’jua dhuronte këto libra pjesëmarrësve të kongresit republikan në korrik. Një rrugë e dy punë: edhe libri bëhet bestseller, edhe lekët futen në xhep. (Daily Beast)
  • në maj, në ditën që partia republikane dhe fushata Trump ranë dakord që fushata Trump të marrë donacione nga simpatizantët, fushata Trump pagoi mbi 420 mijë dollarë resortit Mar-a-Lago, me pronar vetë Donaldin, për tre evenimente që ishin organizuar aty disa muaj më parë (një konferencë shtypi dhe dy party për fitore gjatë garave brenda partisë) (Huffington Post)

Do thoni ju “ky është gjeni”. Për të futur lekë në xhepin e vet, gjeni është. Po ka edhe një fjalë tjetër për këtë soj: matrapaz.

The letter from FBI Director Comey announcing the reopening of the Clinton email investigation is already being blown up into more than it is.

As Republicans cheer because they think that they have been thrown an election lifeline, read the whole letter and look at what it says. The letter does not say that Hillary Clinton did anything wrong. The letter states that emails were found that were pertinent to the email investigation while looking into an unrelated matter.

The letter FBI Director Comey reads like what it is, an update on an investigation. The FBI is dotting the Is and crossing the Ts. Comey’s letter destroys the Republican claim that there was a conspiracy to cover up Clinton’s emails. Republicans, including Donald Trump, have spent months criticizing Comey’s investigation, but it turns out that they were wrong.

It would take something unprecedented and dramatic to change the FBI’s original findings. Director Comey made it clear that the agency’s work might not be completed before the election.

The email story that Republicans and the media love, but voters have never cared about is back in the news, but it remains an empty scandal.
Source : Politicususa.

While Clinton has multiple paths to 270 and a wide margin of error, Trump needs almost everything to go perfectly for him Tuesday in order to run the table of almost all of the key tossup states.

  • Clinton has the most sophisticated get-out-the-vote effort in history, while Trump’s campaign is still scrambling to hire canvassers in Florida with seven days to go. Get-out-the-vote efforts are typically judged to be worth about 1-3 percentage points, which could easily tip a right race, and Democrats headed into the fall with a five-to-one paid staff advantage.

The reality is that Clinton’s chances of winning 270 electoral votes have hardly changed from last week.
FiveThirtyEight’s election forecast still gives Clinton a 71 percent chance of winning, while the New York Times’ Upshot model gives her an 88 percent chance, and Princeton University’s model pegs her likelihood at 97%.

Clinton Inc.’s tentacles reach further into DOJ, new report shows

Kur Washington Times del me tituj te tille kaq agresive kundrejt Hidras, duket qarte qe Sindakta kriminale Klinton e ka mbush kupen sa po fillon dhe derdhet,

DOJ dhe FBI po ju vihen k@et ne bige nje nga nje nga emailet e wikit dhe pisllikun qe kane lene pas. Edhe ne rastin me optimist nq se Clinton fiton, do te jete nen ndjekje penale dhe gjithashtu persidentja me e urryer ne historine e Amerikes. Gjithe pergjegjesia i be DP dhe DNC, qe te dyja keto pjese te tentakulave te Hidres Politike qe e ka shendrru SHBAte ne Kleptokraci dhe Republike Bananesh. Demoktratet mund ti jepnin zgjidhje kesaj krize qe ne fillim duke zbythur Clinton dhe canktuar kandidat tjeter (Sanders apo Biden) por askush nga ato vemje neoliberale nuk kishte interesin me te vogel te shpetonte ate vend, thjesh ju interesonin lobistet dhe donatoret…Tashme ti ben me grushta kokes ne menyren si i manipuluan, poshteruan dhe hoqen qafe Sanders megjithese ishte shume here me i favorshem per kandidat.

The Washington, D.C., establishment is an elite group that seeks to protect their power, position and influence. Hillary Clinton’s tentacles are so deep and long in it, she will never be able to drain the swamp, because she lives and thrives in it.

Peter Kadzik, assistant attorney general at the Department of Justice — who assured Congress on Monday that his department will work through the FBI’s probe on Mrs. Clinton’s emails as “expeditiously as possible” — sought to get his son a job on Mrs. Clinton’s presidential campaign.
According to WikiLeak’s documents, Mr. Kadzik has a personal relationship with John Podesta, Mrs. Clinton’s campaign chairman.
“[Kadzik] was invited to a small birthday gathering for Podesta’s lobbyist brother last year,” the Examiner reports. “Kadzik also dined with Podesta at his home in January when the first FBI probe was well underway.”
The report continues: “In 2008, Podesta raved about Kadzik to Cassandra Butts, a member of President Obama’s transition team, and noted Kadzik was ‘willing to help’ with vetting for Obama’s Cabinet.
” ‘Fantastic lawyer. Kept me out of jail,’ Podesta wrote of Kadzik.”
How quaint. This may be how D.C. works, but to the average American, it’s a bit sickening.
Mr. Kadzik isn’t the only person within the Justice Department who has benefited from Clinton Inc.
Just last week, the Wall Street Journal broke a story detailing how the wife of Andrew McCabe, who is second in command at the FBI, received a $500,000 campaign donation from close Clinton confidant and Virginia Gov. Terry McAuliffe.
